title: Shri Siddhivinayak Temple, Mumbai
intro: Shri Siddhivinayak Temple, located in Prabhadevi, Mumbai, is a highly prestigious and popular temple dedicated to Lord Ganesha.
description:
Shri Siddhivinayak Temple – Mumbai, Maharashtra
Introduction
Shri Siddhivinayak Temple, located in Prabhadevi, Mumbai, is a highly prestigious and popular temple dedicated to Lord Ganesha. Known as 'Navasacha Ganapati' (the Ganapati who grants wishes), it is famous for fulfilling the desires of devotees who visit with true faith. Devotees from all over the world come here to seek Bappa's blessings.
Temple Information
 Temple Name: Shri Siddhivinayak Temple
 Location: Prabhadevi, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028
 Presiding Deity: Lord Ganesha
 Significance: One of the wealthiest and most popular temples in Mumbai
History and Significance
Built in 1801 by Vitthal and Deubai Patil, it is believed that the temple grants the wishes of those who visit with genuine devotion. The idol of Lord Ganesha is 'Swayambhu' (self-manifested), and its trunk is tilted towards the right, which is considered very auspicious.
How to Reach
✈️ By Air: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport (Mumbai) is the nearest. Taxis or cab services are available to reach the temple.
🚆 By Train: Dadar Railway Station is the nearest major station. The temple is about 2-3 km away; local taxis or BEST buses are easily available.
🛣️ By Road: Easily accessible from any part of Mumbai via taxi, auto-rickshaw, or public transport.
Best Time to Visit
The temple is open throughout the year, but Tuesdays are considered special for Lord Ganesha.
 Main time: Early morning (less crowded).
 Special occasion: Ganesh Chaturthi.
Main Festivals
 Ganesh Chaturthi: The biggest festival at the temple.
 Sankashti and Angaraki Chaturthi: These days witness huge crowds for special worship and darshan.
Temple Timings
🕒 General Timings: 5:30 AM to 9:00 PM.
(Timings may change on special days and festivals.)
Nearby Attractions
 Dadar Chowpatty (Dadar Beach)
 Worli Sea Face
 Shivaji Park
Dress Code
Modest and traditional clothing is appropriate within the temple premises.
Facilities for Devotees
 Online darshan and donation facilities.
 Prasad counters.
 Wheelchair assistance and help for senior citizens.
Conclusion
Shri Siddhivinayak Temple is the center of faith in Mumbai. Famous for its peace and spiritual energy, the temple offers a uniquely positive experience to devotees

faq.q1: To which deity is the Siddhivinayak Temple dedicated?
faq.a1: This temple is dedicated to Lord Shri Ganesha.
faq.q2: Where is the Siddhivinayak Temple located?
faq.a2: It is located in Prabhadevi, Mumbai, Maharashtra.
faq.q3: What is the Siddhivinayak Temple famous for?
faq.a3: It is famous for the devotion of Lord Ganesha, faith, and the fulfillment of wishes.
faq.q4: What is the best time to visit the Siddhivinayak Temple?
faq.a4: The temple is open all year round, but there is a special celebration during Ganesh Chaturthi.
